properties.name: lifecycle.confirmed-to-processing-seconds
properties.description: Seconds before CONFIRMED transitions to PROCESSING.

properties.name: lifecycle.processing-to-transit-seconds
properties.description: Seconds before PROCESSING transitions to IN_TRANSIT.

properties.name: lifecycle.transit-to-delivered-seconds
properties.description: Seconds before IN_TRANSIT transitions to DELIVERED.

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT expiration in milliseconds.

properties.name: cpi.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the SAP CPI tenant (iFlow host).

properties.name: cpi.po-outbound-path
properties.description: Path of the iFlow 1 PO-outbound HTTPS sender endpoint.

properties.name: cpi.token-url
properties.description: OAuth2 token URL for the CPI client-credentials flow.

properties.name: cpi.client-id
properties.description: OAuth2 client id for the CPI service key.

properties.name: cpi.client-secret
properties.description: OAuth2 client secret for the CPI service key.

properties.name: cpi.inbound-secret
properties.description: Shared secret expected in the X-CPI-Secret header on inbound CPI calls.

properties.name: cpi.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Outbound CPI connect timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: cpi.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: Outbound CPI read timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: cpi.max-retries
properties.description: Max retry attempts for transient outbound CPI failures.

properties.name: cpi.retry-backoff-ms
properties.description: Base backoff in milliseconds between outbound CPI retries.

properties.name: cpi.max-open-pos
properties.description: Maximum number of concurrently-open (RECEIVED) inbound POs.

properties.name: simulator.enabled
properties.description: Whether the System 2 simulator starts running on boot.

properties.name: simulator.interval-ms
properties.description: Simulator tick interval in milliseconds.

properties.name: simulator.initial-delay-ms
properties.description: Delay before the simulator's first tick after startup (ms).

properties.name: simulator.max-open-pos
properties.description: Max open POs the simulator lets pile up on System 1's vendor queue.

properties.name: simulator.reject-rate
properties.description: Fraction of System 1 procurement POs the simulated S2 vendor rejects (0.0-1.0).
